description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a spacious, open layout. The property is surrounded by a wooden fence and features lush landscaping with numerous trees and shrubs, providing privacy and greenery. The backyard includes a large swimming pool and a wooden deck area, ideal for outdoor relaxation and entertainment. The front of the house has a driveway leading to a garage, with a paved walkway flanked by manicured lawns and ornamental bushes. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, allowing ample natural light into the interior spaces. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, functional outdoor spaces, and a harmonious integration with the surrounding garden.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, landscaped gardens, and a backyard pool, enclosed by a wooden fence.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house from above the backyard, highlighting the pool, deck, and dense landscaping along the rear fence.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the front of the house, featuring the driveway, garage, main entryway, and manicured front lawn.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the house from the rear corner, emphasizing the pool, wooden fence, and tree coverage.
description_view_3: View 3 captures the side and rear of the house, showing the pool, deck, and a variety of trees and shrubs along the property edge.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a single door, small steps, and a paved walkway, flanked by shrubs and a covered porch area.
